note: Wave 2 of the build (handoff-spec.md steps 4-6). Domain core + Web Worker (steps 2-3) already done. Root is the Tournament model+adapter, NOT import/persistence. Full task detail in the plan file; each task also points at its settled spec under docs/.

tasks.subject: Task 1: Canonical Tournament model + solver adapter + live carryover
tasks.description: Create the serializable Tournament graph (Referee/Court/Day/Round/Match/Assignment/Slot, stable ids) per domain-model.md; adapter Tournament<->Problem/Sol per day; carryoverFor() folding finalized earlier days via domain/carry. Widen Vitest include to src/{domain,model,import,persistence}. Round-trip + carryover tests. THE WAVE ROOT.

tasks.subject: Task 2: Import — SheetJS fixtures -> Tournament (merge on re-import)
tasks.description: One detector for xlsx/paste/csv -> Tournament patch. Swedish column map, round = distinct-sorted Starttid rank, Klass H/D -> M/W, requiresAssistant default true, highlight from Matchnamn, merge by Kamp Id preserving assignments/pins + flagging moves, per-row errors. Test against reference/federation-export-sample.tsv. Spec: persistence-spec.md 1.

tasks.subject: Task 3: Persistence — serialize/migrate + IndexedDB library
tasks.description: serialize/deserialize around {schemaVersion:1, exportedAt, appVersion, tournament}; migrate() refuses newer / runs vN->vN+1 / loads equal (v1 only, seam present); db.ts IndexedDB library of N via idb + lastOpenedId meta + debounced autosave (~500ms). Carryover never serialized. Spec: persistence-spec.md 0/2/3.

tasks.subject: Task 4: i18n catalogue + t() helper
tasks.description: Hand-rolled t(key, params) with named-placeholder substitution against en.json; no i18n library. English ships; sv.json later is a mechanical swap. Strings drawn from warnings-spec.md + ui-spec.md. WAVE ROOT (no deps).

tasks.subject: Task 5: Wizard shell — Setup/Import/Export steps + app state + autosave
tasks.description: Wizard scaffold (Setup->Import->Generate->Review->Export) + tournament picker on launch (lastOpenedId); Setup roster entry, Import step wiring fixtures->store, Export JSON download + IndexedDB autosave. Grid/review/print slot in via Task 11. Spec: ui-spec.md, persistence-spec.md 2.2.

tasks.subject: Task 6: Round×court editable grid (primary review surface)
tasks.description: Dense sparse round×court grid from a Tournament day; pin toggle + override dropdown mutate Slot; per-ref color by stable id; idle/not-refereed cells; disabled during solve. Standalone, props-fed. Spec: ui-spec.md, domain-model.md (cell=(round,court)).

tasks.subject: Task 7: Per-referee review view (timeline + fairness bars)
tasks.description: Per-ref duty timeline across rounds + H/A fairness bars from the score breakdown. Read-only; plugs into the Review drawer (Task 11). Spec: ui-spec.md.

tasks.subject: Task 8: Warnings panel (3 severity tiers)
tasks.description: From Score breakdown + schedule, surface all nonzero soft constraints by tier (Blocker/Forced/Bent) with exact English catalogue strings; per-instance lines recomputed on main (no new worker fields); green empty state; no 'solver' in any string. Spec: warnings-spec.md.

tasks.subject: Task 9: Generate modal + worker solve controller (state machine)
tasks.description: Main-thread synchronous precheck (fail->modal error, no worker); ok->spawn worker, post SolveReq (Generate warmStart:true / Reshuffle new seed warmStart:false), patch ticker on progress, on done wait max(0,600-elapsed) then apply atomically + warn banner if bent; Cancel keeps best-so-far. Worker protocol already built. Spec: issues/07-solve-progress-ui.md.

tasks.subject: Task 10: Print / export views (@media print)
tasks.description: Three print layouts (wall grid landscape, per-ref duty slips 2-up portrait, per-court call sheets portrait) via @media print + @page per artifact; id-color dot print-color-adjust:exact; gender text; header tournament·day·generated-at. Standalone. Spec: print-spec.md.

tasks.subject: Task 11: Review/Export assembly + end-to-end smoke
tasks.description: Wire grid + referee-view + warnings + Generate modal into the wizard Review step, and print into Export; full click-through on the sample fixture (import->roster->Generate->pin/override->Reshuffle->Export->print). Final integration; depends on everything.
